blurb: Cambridge public-policy research institute (Bennett Institute / Bennett School of Public Policy) focused on place, progress, productivity and decision-making in government.

publications.title: The Manchester Model: what foreign inward investment reveals about the UK's most productive city outside London
publications.summary: Analysis of foreign inward investment patterns in Manchester, the UK's most productive city outside London.

publications.title: Outsourcing the final frontier: Space X, the East India Company and the political economy of space
publications.summary: Examines the political economy of private space actors through historical comparison with the East India Company.

publications.title: More than just plug and play: Early evidence on organisational capital and AI adoption
publications.summary: Early evidence on the role of organisational capital in firms' adoption of AI.

notes: Main /research and /publications pages are JS-rendered (readability returned only nav/newsletter). Recovered real items via the WordPress RSS feed at /publications/feed/ (titles, links, dc:creator authors, and pubDate timestamps). Note: dc:creator 'Rebecca Leam' appears to be the site/comms uploader rather than the academic author. Selected 3 most recent items.
